description: Design-to-Fullstack (dtfs) plugin marketplace — harness for turning designs into full-stack apps via Claude Code.

plugins.name: dtfs-core
plugins.description: Core transversal commands (status, apply), guard hook, and MCP server pointer. Required by all other dtfs plugins.

plugins.name: dtfs-natural-spec
plugins.description: Natural language to structured spec: product analyst, screen spec writer, question manager (Phases 1–3).

plugins.name: dtfs-speckit
plugins.description: Spec Kit SDD writer and reviewer, platform mapper, requirement extractor (Phase 4–6).

plugins.name: dtfs-html-import
plugins.description: Import HTML mockups/designs into ScreenSpec format.

plugins.name: dtfs-history
plugins.description: ChangeSet history, diff explanations, and revert capabilities.

plugins.name: dtfs-behaviors
plugins.description: Behavior expansion reference and expand_behaviors tool documentation.

plugins.name: dtfs-codegen
plugins.description: Code generation reference and generate_app tool documentation.

plugins.name: dtfs-security
plugins.description: Governance, guard hook, spec validator, and validate command (defense-in-depth).
